<!DOCTYPE html>  
  
<html lang="en">  
<head>  
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>  
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"/>  
  <title>Hall of Frame Coventry | Bespoke Picture Framing</title>  
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">  
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>  
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">  
  <style>  
    :root {  
      --navy:    #1a3a5c;  
      --blue:    #2e6da4;  
      --sky:     #d6e8f7;  
      --pale:    #f0f6fc;  
      --gold:    #c9933a;  
      --gold-lt: #f5e6c8;  
      --sage:    #5d8a6e;  
      --sage-lt: #ddeee5;  
      --rose:    #c0706a;  
      --white:   #ffffff;  
      --muted:   #5a7a96;  
      --border:  #ccdeed;  
      --text:    #1a2b3c;  
    }  
    *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}  
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth}  
    body{font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;background:var(--white);color:var(--text);font-weight:300;line-height:1.7;overflow-x:hidden}  
  
```  
/* ── NAV ── */  
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;background:rgba(255,255,255,.96);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 5%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:70px}  
.nav-logo{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:.03em;text-decoration:none}  
.nav-logo span{color:var(--gold)}  
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem;list-style:none}  
.nav-links a{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}  
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--navy)}  
.nav-cta{background:var(--navy)!important;color:var(--white)!important;padding:.45rem 1.1rem;border-radius:2px}  
.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--blue)!important}  
  
/* ── HERO ── */  
#hero{min-height:100vh;background:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:100px 5% 60px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}  
.hero-bg-stripe{position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:42%;height:100%;background:var(--pale);clip-path:polygon(12% 0,100% 0,100% 100%,0% 100%);z-index:0}  
.hero-photo{position:absolute;right:6%;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:340px;height:430px;z-index:1}  
.hero-photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;border:16px solid var(--navy)}  
.hero-photo::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:6px;border:2px solid var(--gold);opacity:.5;z-index:2;pointer-events:none}  
.badge{position:absolute;bottom:-18px;left:-24px;background:var(--gold);color:var(--white);padding:1rem 1.4rem;z-index:3;text-align:center}  
.badge-num{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1;display:block}  
.badge-txt{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.9}  
.hero-content{max-width:520px;position:relative;z-index:1;opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);animation:fadeUp .9s .2s forwards}  
.hero-eyebrow{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:1.2rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem}  
.hero-eyebrow::before{content:'';width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--blue);display:inline-block}  
h1{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(2.8rem,5vw,4.8rem);font-weight:400;line-height:1.08;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:1.5rem}  
h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}  
.hero-sub{font-size:.97rem;color:var(--muted);max-width:410px;margin-bottom:2.5rem;line-height:1.8}  
.hero-actions{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}  
.btn-primary{background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);padding:.85rem 2rem;font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border:none;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;transition:background .25s,transform .2s}  
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--blue);transform:translateY(-1px)}  
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--navy);padding:.85rem 2rem;font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border:1px solid var(--navy);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;transition:all .25s}  
.btn-ghost:hover{background:var(--navy);color:var(--white)}  
.btn-gold{background:var(--gold);color:var(--white);padding:.85rem 2rem;font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border:none;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;transition:background .25s,transform .2s}  
.btn-gold:hover{background:#b07e2a;transform:translateY(-1px)}  
  
/* ── TRUST ── */  
.trust-bar{background:var(--navy);padding:1.2rem 5%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:3rem;flex-wrap:wrap}  
.trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.08em}  
.trust-item .icon{font-size:1rem;color:var(--gold)}  
  
/* ── SECTION BASE ── */  
section{padding:90px 5%}  
.section-label{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.7rem}  
.section-label::before{content:'';width:22px;height:1px;background:var(--blue);display:inline-block}  
h2{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(2.1rem,3.5vw,3.1rem);font-weight:400;color:var(--navy);line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:1.5rem}  
h2 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}  
  
/* ── ABOUT ── */  
#about{background:var(--pale);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center}  
.about-visual{position:relative;height:440px}  
.about-img-main{width:270px;height:340px;object-fit:cover;position:absolute;top:40px;left:20px;border:14px solid var(--navy);display:block}  
.about-img-secondary{width:200px;height:240px;object-fit:cover;position:absolute;bottom:10px;right:0;border:10px solid var(--white);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(26,58,92,.15);display:block}  
.about-badge{position:absolute;top:18px;right:0;background:var(--gold);color:var(--white);padding:1rem 1.6rem;text-align:center;z-index:2}  
.about-badge-num{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:2.4rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1;display:block}  
.about-badge-lbl{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.9}  
.about-text p{color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1.2rem}  
.about-text strong{color:var(--navy);font-weight:500}  
.star-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;margin-top:1.5rem;padding-top:1.5rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}  
.stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:.9rem;letter-spacing:2px}  
.star-row span{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)}  
  
/* ── SERVICES ── */  
#services{background:var(--white)}  
.services-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:3rem;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1.5rem}  
.services-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px}  
.service-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:2.2rem 1.8rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s}  
.service-card:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--blue);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(26,58,92,.08)}  
.service-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:3px;height:0;background:var(--gold);transition:height .3s}  
.service-card:hover::before{height:100%}  
.svc-num{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:3rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--sky);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.6rem}  
.service-card h3{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.7rem}  
.service-card p{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7}  
  
/* ── PROCESS ── */  
#process{background:var(--navy);color:var(--white)}  
#process .section-label{color:var(--gold)}  
#process .section-label::before{background:var(--gold)}  
#process h2{color:var(--white)}  
#process h2 em{color:var(--gold)}  
.steps{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);margin-top:3.5rem;position:relative}  
.steps::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:40px;left:16%;right:16%;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12)}  
.step{padding:0 2rem;text-align:center;position:relative}  
.step:not(:last-child)::after{content:'→';position:absolute;right:-.5rem;top:17px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);font-size:1.2rem}  
.step-num{width:54px;height:54px;border:1px solid rgba(201,147,58,.4);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--gold);margin:0 auto 1.5rem;background:rgba(201,147,58,.08)}  
.step h3{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:.8rem;color:var(--white)}  
.step p{font-size:.86rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);line-height:1.7}  
  
/* ── GALLERY ── */  
#gallery{background:var(--pale)}  
.gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);grid-template-rows:220px 220px;gap:8px;margin-top:2.5rem}  
.g-item{overflow:hidden;position:relative;cursor:pointer}  
.g-item img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .5s ease}  
.g-item:hover img{transform:scale(1.06)}  
.g-item.wide{grid-column:span 2}  
.g-item.tall{grid-row:span 2}  
.g-cap{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:1.2rem .8rem .6rem;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(26,58,92,.8));color:var(--white);font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:.85rem}  
.g-item:hover .g-cap{opacity:1}  
  
/* ── FRAME CUSTOMISER ── */  
#customiser{background:var(--white)}  
#customiser h2 em{color:var(--gold)}  
.customiser-intro{color:var(--muted);max-width:560px;margin-bottom:2.5rem;font-size:.95rem}  
.customiser-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 380px;gap:50px;align-items:start}  
.preview-area{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:420px;background:var(--pale);border:1px solid var(--border)}  
.frame-preview-wrap{position:relative;transition:all .35s ease;display:inline-block}  
#preview-img{display:block;max-width:320px;max-height:360px;width:auto;height:auto;object-fit:contain;position:relative;z-index:1;transition:all .35s}  
.upload-placeholder{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;padding:3rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0}  
.upload-placeholder.hidden{display:none}  
.upload-icon{font-size:3rem;opacity:.25}  
.upload-label-text{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.08em}  
.upload-btn-label{background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);padding:.6rem 1.4rem;font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-weight:500;transition:background .2s}  
.upload-btn-label:hover{background:var(--blue)}  
#file-input{display:none}  
/* frame styles */  
.frame-preview-wrap.frame-none #preview-img{border:none}  
.frame-preview-wrap.frame-black #preview-img{border:20px solid #1a1a1a;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 3px #3a3a3a,0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}  
.frame-preview-wrap.frame-white #preview-img{border:20px solid #f5f5f0;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px #ddd,0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.12)}  
.frame-preview-wrap.frame-gold #preview-img{border:22px solid #c9933a;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 3px #e8b86d,inset 0 0 0 6px #a07028,0 8px 32px rgba(180,130,40,.3)}  
.frame-preview-wrap.frame-navy #preview-img{border:20px solid #1a3a5c;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 3px #2e6da4,0 8px 32px rgba(26,58,92,.3)}  
.frame-preview-wrap.frame-silver #preview-img{border:20px solid #9a9fa8;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 3px #c8ced6,inset 0 0 0 6px #7a7f88,0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}  
.frame-preview-wrap.frame-oak #preview-img{border:22px solid #8B5E3C;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 3px #a07048,inset 0 0 0 6px #6b4428,0 8px 32px rgba(100,70,40,.25)}  
.frame-preview-wrap.frame-walnut #preview-img{border:22px solid #3d2314;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 3px #5a3520,inset 0 0 0 6px #2a1508,0 8px 32px rgba(40,20,8,.3)}  
/* mount = background of wrap */  
.frame-preview-wrap{padding:0}  
.frame-preview-wrap.mount-white{background:#ffffff}  
.frame-preview-wrap.mount-cream{background:#f5f0e8}  
.frame-preview-wrap.mount-black{background:#1a1a1a}  
.frame-preview-wrap.mount-navy{background:#1a3a5c}  
.frame-preview-wrap.mount-sage{background:#5d8a6e}  
.frame-preview-wrap.mount-rose{background:#c0706a}  
.frame-preview-wrap.mount-charcoal{background:#3a3a3a}  
/* when mount is active, add padding to show it */  
.frame-preview-wrap.has-mount{padding:16px}  
  
/* controls panel */  
.controls-panel{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.8rem}  
.ctrl-group{}  
.ctrl-label{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.8rem;display:block}  
.swatch-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem}  
.swatch{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;position:relative;transition:transform .2s,border-color .2s}  
.swatch:hover{transform:scale(1.12)}  
.swatch.active{border-color:var(--navy);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--white),0 0 0 4px var(--navy)}  
.swatch.frame-swatch-none{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eee 50%,#ccc 50%);border:2px solid #ccc}  
.swatch.frame-swatch-black{background:#1a1a1a}  
.swatch.frame-swatch-white{background:#f5f5f0;border-color:#ddd}  
.swatch.frame-swatch-gold{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e8b86d,#c9933a,#a07028)}  
.swatch.frame-swatch-navy{background:#1a3a5c}  
.swatch.frame-swatch-silver{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8ced6,#9a9fa8,#7a7f88)}  
.swatch.frame-swatch-oak{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c49a6c,#8B5E3C,#6b4428)}  
.swatch.frame-swatch-walnut{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5a3520,#3d2314,#2a1508)}  
.mount-swatch-white{background:#ffffff;border:2px solid #ddd!important}  
.mount-swatch-cream{background:#f5f0e8}  
.mount-swatch-black{background:#1a1a1a}  
.mount-swatch-navy{background:#1a3a5c}  
.mount-swatch-sage{background:#5d8a6e}  
.mount-swatch-rose{background:#c0706a}  
.mount-swatch-charcoal{background:#3a3a3a}  
.mount-swatch-none{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eee 50%,#ccc 50%);border:2px solid #ccc!important}  
.ctrl-hint{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.6rem;font-style:italic}  
.download-btn{width:100%;text-align:center;margin-top:.5rem}  
  
/* ── REVIEWS ── */  
#reviews{background:var(--pale)}  
.reviews-summary{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2rem;margin-bottom:3rem;padding:2rem;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border)}  
.rating-big{text-align:center;min-width:100px}  
.rating-num{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:4rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--navy);line-height:1}  
.rating-stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:2px;margin:.3rem 0}  
.rating-label{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)}  
.reviews-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}  
.review-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:1.8rem;transition:all .25s}  
.review-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(26,58,92,.06)}  
.review-stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:.9rem;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:1rem}  
.review-card blockquote{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--navy);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:1rem}  
.review-author{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)}  
.review-source{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--blue);margin-top:.2rem}  
  
/* ── CONTACT ── */  
#contact{background:var(--navy);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:start}  
#contact .section-label{color:var(--gold)}  
#contact .section-label::before{background:var(--gold)}  
#contact h2{color:var(--white)}  
#contact h2 em{color:var(--gold)}  
#contact p.intro{color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin-bottom:0}  
.contact-info-group{margin-top:2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.5rem}  
.contact-item{display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:flex-start}  
.c-icon{width:40px;height:40px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:var(--gold);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}  
.c-label{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.3rem}  
.c-value{font-size:.92rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);line-height:1.6}  
.c-value a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);text-decoration:none}  
.c-value a:hover{color:var(--gold)}  
.enquiry-form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem}  
.form-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.4rem}  
.form-group label{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}  
.form-group input,.form-group textarea,.form-group select{font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--navy);background:var(--white);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);padding:.8rem 1rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;width:100%;resize:none}  
.form-group input:focus,.form-group textarea:focus,.form-group select:focus{border-color:var(--gold)}  
.form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem}  
.form-group textarea{min-height:110px}  
  
/* ── FOOTER ── */  
footer{background:#0d1e2e;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);padding:50px 5% 30px}  
.footer-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;padding-bottom:2rem;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);margin-bottom:2rem;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2rem}  
.footer-brand{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--white)}  
.footer-brand span{color:var(--gold)}  
.footer-tagline{font-size:.8rem;margin-top:.4rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-style:italic;font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif}  
.footer-nav{display:flex;gap:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap}  
.footer-nav a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-decoration:none;font-size:.76rem;letter-spacing:.08em;transition:color .2s}  
.footer-nav a:hover{color:var(--gold)}  
.footer-bottom{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:.73rem;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem}  
.footer-bottom a{color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none}  
  
/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */  
@keyframes fadeUp{to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}  
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease}  
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}  
  
/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */  
@media(max-width:980px){  
  #about,#contact{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:3rem}  
  .hero-photo{display:none}  
  .customiser-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}  
  .services-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}  
  .steps{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2.5rem}  
  .steps::before,.step:not(:last-child)::after{display:none}  
  .reviews-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}  
  .gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);grid-template-rows:auto}  
  .g-item.wide,.g-item.tall{grid-column:auto;grid-row:auto}  
  .g-item{height:200px}  
  .nav-links{display:none}  
}  
@media(max-width:600px){  
  .services-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}  
  h1{font-size:2.5rem}  
  .trust-bar{gap:1.2rem}  
  .form-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}  
  .reviews-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}  
  .gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}  
}  
```  
  
  </style>  
</head>  
<body>  
  
<!-- NAV -->  
  
<nav>  
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-logo">Hall <span>of</span> Frame</a>  
  <ul class="nav-links">  
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>  
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>  
    <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>  
    <li><a href="#customiser">Try a Frame</a></li>  
    <li><a href="#reviews">Reviews</a></li>  
    <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Get in Touch</a></li>  
  </ul>  
</nav>  
  
<!-- HERO -->  
  
<section id="hero">  
  <div class="hero-bg-stripe"></div>  
  <div class="hero-content">  
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Coventry's Bespoke Framers</p>  
    <h1>Frames <em>crafted</em><br>with care.</h1>  
    <p class="hero-sub">Bespoke picture framing for art, photography, memorabilia and mirrors — made to last a lifetime, in the heart of Earlsdon.</p>  
    <div class="hero-actions">  
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary">Request a Quote</a>  
      <a href="#customiser" class="btn-gold">Try a Frame →</a>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
  <div class="hero-photo">  
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Framed Bellingham signed England shirt">  
    <div class="badge">  
      <span class="badge-num">104+</span>  
      <span class="badge-txt">5&#9733; Reviews</span>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
</section>  
  
<!-- TRUST BAR -->  
  
<div class="trust-bar">  
  <div class="trust-item"><span class="icon">★</span> 104+ Five-Star Reviews</div>  
  <div class="trust-item"><span class="icon">🖼</span> Bespoke Framing Specialists</div>  
  <div class="trust-item"><span class="icon">📍</span> Based in Earlsdon, Coventry</div>  
  <div class="trust-item"><span class="icon">💬</span> Personal Consultations Available</div>  
</div>  
  
<!-- ABOUT -->  
  
<section id="about">  
  <div class="about-visual reveal">  
    <img class="about-img-main" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Beautifully framed newborn photo">  
    <img class="about-img-secondary" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Happy Hall of Frame customers">  
    <div class="about-badge">  
      <span class="about-badge-num">104+</span>  
      <span class="about-badge-lbl">Five&#8209;Star Reviews</span>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
  <div class="about-text reveal">  
    <p class="section-label">Who We Are</p>  
    <h2>A studio built on <em>craft &amp; care.</em></h2>  
    <p>Hall of Frame is Coventry's go-to destination for bespoke picture framing. Based in Earlsdon, we work with <strong>individuals, businesses, and collectors</strong> to protect and present the things that matter most.</p>  
    <p>From a treasured family photograph to a signed sports shirt, we treat every piece as a unique commission — advising on materials, mounts, and finishes to get the result exactly right.</p>  
    <p>With <strong>personal consultations as standard</strong>, you'll never feel rushed. We take the time, because the result is worth it.</p>  
    <div class="star-row">  
      <span class="stars">★★★★★</span>  
      <span>Rated 5.0 on Google &mdash; 104+ independent reviews</span>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
</section>  
  
<!-- SERVICES -->  
  
<section id="services">  
  <div class="services-header reveal">  
    <div>  
      <p class="section-label">What We Do</p>  
      <h2>Our <em>services.</em></h2>  
    </div>  
    <a href="#contact" class="btn-ghost">Talk to Us</a>  
  </div>  
  <div class="services-grid">  
    <div class="service-card reveal">  
      <div class="svc-num">01</div>  
      <h3>Bespoke Picture Framing</h3>  
      <p>Custom frames made to measure for your artwork, prints, and photography. A huge range of mouldings, mounts, and glass options.</p>  
    </div>  
    <div class="service-card reveal">  
      <div class="svc-num">02</div>  
      <h3>Canvas Stretching</h3>  
      <p>Professional canvas stretching for artists and collectors. Tight, flat, and gallery-ready — preserving your canvas for years to come.</p>  
    </div>  
    <div class="service-card reveal">  
      <div class="svc-num">03</div>  
      <h3>Sports Memorabilia</h3>  
      <p>Signed shirts, programmes, and match day memories — mounted and framed to last a lifetime. Display your passion properly.</p>  
    </div>  
    <div class="service-card reveal">  
      <div class="svc-num">04</div>  
      <h3>Mirrors</h3>  
      <p>Custom-framed mirrors to complement any interior. Choose your style, size, and finish for something truly unique.</p>  
    </div>  
    <div class="service-card reveal">  
      <div class="svc-num">05</div>  
      <h3>Mounting &amp; Presentation</h3>  
      <p>Professional mounting for certificates, maps, photographs, and documents. UV-protective glass available to prevent fading.</p>  
    </div>  
    <div class="service-card reveal">  
      <div class="svc-num">06</div>  
      <h3>Personal Consultations</h3>  
      <p>Not sure where to start? Come in for expert advice — no pressure, just honest guidance tailored to your piece and your home.</p>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
</section>  
  
<!-- PROCESS -->  
  
<section id="process">  
  <div class="reveal">  
    <p class="section-label">How It Works</p>  
    <h2>From enquiry to <em>finished frame.</em></h2>  
  </div>  
  <div class="steps">  
    <div class="step reveal">  
      <div class="step-num">1</div>  
      <h3>Make Contact</h3>  
      <p>Get in touch by phone, email, or visit the studio. We'll arrange a time and discuss your project from the very start.</p>  
    </div>  
    <div class="step reveal">  
      <div class="step-num">2</div>  
      <h3>Design &amp; Choose</h3>  
      <p>We guide you through the perfect moulding, mount, and finish. Expert advice at every step, no jargon.</p>  
    </div>  
    <div class="step reveal">  
      <div class="step-num">3</div>  
      <h3>Collect Your Frame</h3>  
      <p>Once complete, collect from the studio — beautifully wrapped and ready to hang or gift.</p>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
</section>  
  
<!-- GALLERY -->  
  
<section id="gallery">  
  <div class="reveal">  
    <p class="section-label">Our Work</p>  
    <h2>From the <em>studio.</em></h2>  
  </div>  
  <div class="gallery-grid reveal">  
    <div class="g-item tall">  
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Signed Manchester United shirt framed">  
      <div class="g-cap">Signed Man Utd Shirt</div>  
    </div>  
    <div class="g-item wide">  
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Framed city maps">  
      <div class="g-cap">Framed City Map Prints</div>  
    </div>  
    <div class="g-item">  
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="David Bowie artwork framed">  
      <div class="g-cap">Bowie Artwork</div>  
    </div>  
    <div class="g-item">  
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Town scene painting framed">  
      <div class="g-cap">Framed Art Print</div>  
    </div>  
    <div class="g-item">  
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="McLaren F1 print framed">  
      <div class="g-cap">McLaren F1 Print</div>  
    </div>  
    <div class="g-item">  
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Bellingham signed England shirt framed">  
      <div class="g-cap">Signed Bellingham Shirt</div>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
</section>  
  
<!-- FRAME CUSTOMISER -->  
  
<section id="customiser">  
  <div class="reveal">  
    <p class="section-label">Try Before You Visit</p>  
    <h2>See your picture in a <em>frame.</em></h2>  
    <p class="customiser-intro">Upload your own photo and experiment with different frame styles and mount colours. It's not quite the same as seeing it in person — but it's a great way to get ideas before you pop in!</p>  
  </div>  
  <div class="customiser-layout reveal">  
    <!-- PREVIEW -->  
    <div>  
      <div class="preview-area" id="preview-area">  
        <div class="upload-placeholder" id="upload-placeholder">  
          <div class="upload-icon">🖼</div>  
          <p class="upload-label-text">Upload your photo or artwork to get started</p>  
          <label class="upload-btn-label" for="file-input">Choose a Photo</label>  
        </div>  
        <div class="frame-preview-wrap frame-none mount-none" id="frame-wrap" style="display:none">  
          <img id="preview-img" src="" alt="Your photo preview">  
        </div>  
      </div>  
      <p style="font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.8rem;font-style:italic;text-align:center">Your photo stays on your device — it's never uploaded anywhere.</p>  
      <input type="file" id="file-input" accept="image/*">  
    </div>  
  
```  
<!-- CONTROLS -->  
<div class="controls-panel">  
  <div class="ctrl-group">  
    <span class="ctrl-label">Frame Style</span>  
    <div class="swatch-row" id="frame-swatches">  
      <div class="swatch frame-swatch-none active" data-frame="frame-none" title="No Frame"></div>  
      <div class="swatch frame-swatch-black" data-frame="frame-black" title="Gloss Black"></div>  
      <div class="swatch frame-swatch-white" data-frame="frame-white" title="Bright White"></div>  
      <div class="swatch frame-swatch-gold" data-frame="frame-gold" title="Gold Ornate"></div>  
      <div class="swatch frame-swatch-navy" data-frame="frame-navy" title="Deep Navy"></div>  
      <div class="swatch frame-swatch-silver" data-frame="frame-silver" title="Brushed Silver"></div>  
      <div class="swatch frame-swatch-oak" data-frame="frame-oak" title="Light Oak Wood"></div>  
      <div class="swatch frame-swatch-walnut" data-frame="frame-walnut" title="Dark Walnut Wood"></div>  
    </div>  
    <p class="ctrl-hint" id="frame-name-label">No Frame selected</p>  
  </div>  
  
  <div class="ctrl-group">  
    <span class="ctrl-label">Mount Colour</span>  
    <div class="swatch-row" id="mount-swatches">  
      <div class="swatch mount-swatch-none active" data-mount="none" title="No Mount"></div>  
      <div class="swatch mount-swatch-white" data-mount="white" title="White"></div>  
      <div class="swatch mount-swatch-cream" data-mount="cream" title="Cream"></div>  
      <div class="swatch mount-swatch-black" data-mount="black" title="Black"></div>  
      <div class="swatch mount-swatch-navy" data-mount="navy" title="Navy Blue"></div>  
      <div class="swatch mount-swatch-sage" data-mount="sage" title="Sage Green"></div>  
      <div class="swatch mount-swatch-rose" data-mount="rose" title="Dusty Rose"></div>  
      <div class="swatch mount-swatch-charcoal" data-mount="charcoal" title="Charcoal"></div>  
    </div>  
    <p class="ctrl-hint" id="mount-name-label">No Mount selected</p>  
  </div>  
  
  <div class="ctrl-group" style="padding:1.2rem;background:var(--pale);border:1px solid var(--border)">  
    <p style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.6rem">Like what you see?</p>  
    <p style="font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1rem;line-height:1.6">Pop into the studio in Earlsdon and we'll recreate it exactly — with expert advice on the best finish for your piece.</p>  
    <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary" style="display:block;text-align:center">Book a Consultation</a>  
  </div>  
</div>  
```  
  
  </div>  
</section>  
  
<!-- REVIEWS -->  
  
<section id="reviews">  
  <div class="reveal">  
    <p class="section-label">What Our Customers Say</p>  
    <h2>Over 104 <em>five-star reviews.</em></h2>  
  </div>  
  <div class="reviews-summary reveal">  
    <div class="rating-big">  
      <div class="rating-num">5.0</div>  
      <div class="rating-stars">★★★★★</div>  
      <div class="rating-label">Google Rating</div>  
    </div>  
    <div style="flex:1;border-left:1px solid var(--border);padding-left:2rem">  
      <p style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.5rem">"Coventry's most trusted bespoke framers — 104+ five-star reviews and counting."</p>  
      <p style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)">Independently verified on Google Business</p>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
  <div class="reviews-grid">  
    <div class="review-card reveal">  
      <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>  
      <blockquote>"Absolutely outstanding service. My artwork came back beautifully framed and far exceeded my expectations. I won't go anywhere else."</blockquote>  
      <div class="review-author">Sarah M.</div>  
      <div class="review-source">Google Review</div>  
    </div>  
    <div class="review-card reveal">  
      <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>  
      <blockquote>"Brought in a signed shirt and it looks incredible. The advice on the frame and mount was spot-on. So pleased with the result."</blockquote>  
      <div class="review-author">James T.</div>  
      <div class="review-source">Google Review</div>  
    </div>  
    <div class="review-card reveal">  
      <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>  
      <blockquote>"Really helpful and professional. Turnaround was quick and the quality is amazing. Recommended Hall of Frame to everyone I know."</blockquote>  
      <div class="review-author">Claire R.</div>  
      <div class="review-source">Google Review</div>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
</section>  
  
<!-- CONTACT -->  
  
<section id="contact">  
  <div class="reveal">  
    <p class="section-label">Get in Touch</p>  
    <h2>Let's talk about your <em>project.</em></h2>  
    <p class="intro">We'd love to hear about what you'd like framed. Drop us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.</p>  
    <div class="contact-info-group">  
      <div class="contact-item">  
        <div class="c-icon">📍</div>  
        <div>  
          <p class="c-label">Address</p>  
          <p class="c-value">Earlsdon, Coventry, West Midlands</p>  
        </div>  
      </div>  
      <div class="contact-item">  
        <div class="c-icon">🌐</div>  
        <div>  
          <p class="c-label">Website</p>  
          <p class="c-value"><a href="https://hallofframe.uk" target="_blank">hallofframe.uk</a></p>  
        </div>  
      </div>  
      <div class="contact-item">  
        <div class="c-icon">★</div>  
        <div>  
          <p class="c-label">Reviews</p>  
          <p class="c-value">104+ Five-Star Reviews on Google</p>  
        </div>  
      </div>  
    </div>  
  </div>  
  <div class="reveal">  
    <form class="enquiry-form" onsubmit="handleSubmit(event)">  
      <div class="form-row">  
        <div class="form-group">  
          <label>Your Name</label>  
          <input type="text" placeholder="Jane Smith" required>  
        </div>  
        <div class="form-group">  
          <label>Email Address</label>  
          <input type="email" placeholder="your@email.com" required>  
        </div>  
      </div>  
      <div class="form-group">  
        <label>Service Interested In</label>  
        <select>  
          <option value="">Select a service…</option>  
          <option>Bespoke Picture Framing</option>  
          <option>Canvas Stretching</option>  
          <option>Sports Memorabilia</option>  
          <option>Mirrors</option>  
          <option>Mounting &amp; Presentation</option>  
          <option>General Enquiry</option>  
        </select>  
      </div>  
      <div class="form-group">  
        <label>Tell Us About Your Project</label>  
        <textarea placeholder="Describe what you'd like framed, any requirements, dimensions…" required></textarea>  
      </div>  
      <button type="submit" class="btn-gold" style="width:100%;text-align:center;font-size:.82rem">Send Enquiry →</button>  
    </form>  
    <p id="form-success" style="display:none;color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-style:italic;margin-top:1rem;text-align:center">  
      Thank you — we'll be in touch shortly.  
    </p>  
  </div>  
</section>  
  
<!-- FOOTER -->  
  
<footer>  
  <div class="footer-top">  
    <div>  
      <div class="footer-brand">Hall <span>of</span> Frame</div>  
      <div class="footer-tagline">Bespoke Picture Framing · Earlsdon, Coventry</div>  
    </div>  
    <nav class="footer-nav">  
      <a href="#about">About</a>  
      <a href="#services">Services</a>  
      <a href="#gallery">Gallery</a>  
      <a href="#customiser">Try a Frame</a>  
      <a href="#reviews">Reviews</a>  
      <a href="#contact">Contact</a>  
    </nav>  
  </div>  
  <div class="footer-bottom">  
    <span>&copy; 2025 Hall of Frame Coventry. All rights reserved.</span>  
    <a href="https://hallofframe.uk" target="_blank">hallofframe.uk</a>  
  </div>  
</footer>  
  
<script>  
  // Scroll reveal  
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');  
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {  
    entries.forEach((e, i) => {  
      if (e.isIntersecting) {  
        setTimeout(() => e.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 70);  
        io.unobserve(e.target);  
      }  
    });  
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });  
  reveals.forEach(el => io.observe(el));  
  
  // Form submit  
  function handleSubmit(e) {  
    e.preventDefault();  
    e.target.style.display = 'none';  
    document.getElementById('form-success').style.display = 'block';  
  }  
  
  // ── FRAME CUSTOMISER ──  
  const fileInput   = document.getElementById('file-input');  
  const placeholder = document.getElementById('upload-placeholder');  
  const frameWrap   = document.getElementById('frame-wrap');  
  const previewImg  = document.getElementById('preview-img');  
  const previewArea = document.getElementById('preview-area');  
  
  const frameNames = {  
    'frame-none':'No Frame','frame-black':'Gloss Black','frame-white':'Bright White',  
    'frame-gold':'Gold Ornate','frame-navy':'Deep Navy','frame-silver':'Brushed Silver',  
    'frame-oak':'Light Oak Wood','frame-walnut':'Dark Walnut Wood'  
  };  
  const mountNames = {  
    'none':'No Mount','white':'White','cream':'Cream','black':'Black',  
    'navy':'Navy Blue','sage':'Sage Green','rose':'Dusty Rose','charcoal':'Charcoal'  
  };  
  
  let currentFrame = 'frame-none';  
  let currentMount = 'none';  
  
  // click anywhere on preview area to trigger upload before image loaded  
  previewArea.addEventListener('click', (e) => {  
    if (!previewImg.src || previewImg.src === window.location.href) {  
      fileInput.click();  
    }  
  });  
  
  fileInput.addEventListener('change', (e) => {  
    const file = e.target.files[0];  
    if (!file) return;  
    const reader = new FileReader();  
    reader.onload = (ev) => {  
      previewImg.src = ev.target.result;  
      placeholder.classList.add('hidden');  
      frameWrap.style.display = 'inline-block';  
      applyStyles();  
    };  
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);  
  });  
  
  function applyStyles() {  
    // Frame classes  
    frameWrap.className = 'frame-preview-wrap';  
    frameWrap.classList.add(currentFrame);  
    // Mount  
    if (currentMount !== 'none') {  
      frameWrap.classList.add('mount-' + currentMount);  
      frameWrap.classList.add('has-mount');  
    }  
  }  
  
  // Frame swatches  
  document.querySelectorAll('#frame-swatches .swatch').forEach(sw => {  
    sw.addEventListener('click', () => {  
      document.querySelectorAll('#frame-swatches .swatch').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));  
      sw.classList.add('active');  
      currentFrame = sw.dataset.frame;  
      document.getElementById('frame-name-label').textContent = frameNames[currentFrame] + ' selected';  
      if (previewImg.src && previewImg.src !== window.location.href) applyStyles();  
    });  
  });  
  
  // Mount swatches  
  document.querySelectorAll('#mount-swatches .swatch').forEach(sw => {  
    sw.addEventListener('click', () => {  
      document.querySelectorAll('#mount-swatches .swatch').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));  
      sw.classList.add('active');  
      currentMount = sw.dataset.mount;  
      document.getElementById('mount-name-label').textContent = mountNames[currentMount] + ' selected';  
      if (previewImg.src && previewImg.src !== window.location.href) applyStyles();  
    });  
  });  
</script>  
  
</body>  
</html>
